body.title: agent_datacenter: IMAP 24-hour message retention policy
body.result: IMAPServer.purge_old_messages(retention_hours=24) added: rebuilds mailbox lists, updates seen indices, logs purges. RETENTION_HOURS=24 in device_config.py. config/dovecot.conf.template created with expire plugin config.
body.description:
Configure IMAP-native 24hr retention on all mailboxes. Read messages (SEEN) remain browseable until expiry; they are not deleted on read.

Proposed shape:
- Dovecot production: configure mail_plugins = expire, expire2; set expire=24h for INBOX pattern matching all device mailboxes
- Python stub: IMAPServer.purge_old_messages() called on a 1hr timer; deletes messages with sent_at older than 24hr
- Retention behavior:
  - UNSEEN message: retained until 24hr after sent_at
  - SEEN message: retained until 24hr after sent_at (read does NOT trigger early deletion)
  - Expiry: IMAP EXPUNGE — message gone from mailbox, not recoverable
- Configuration: device_config.py RETENTION_HOURS = 24 (rack-level, not per-device)

Affected files:
- ~/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/bus/imap_server.py (purge logic for Python stub)
- ~/dev/src/agent_datacenter/config/dovecot.conf.template (Dovecot config template for production)

Design rules:
- no-sqlite: retention handled at IMAP level, not via a separate SQLite log

Scope boundary:
IN: 24hr retention config for both Dovecot and Python stub implementations
OUT: manual cleanup tooling (agentctl cleanup-mailboxes — future)

Test plan:
- Python stub: advance clock 25hr via monkeypatch; run purge_old_messages(); old message gone
- SEEN messages at 23hr: still present
- SEEN messages at 25hr: gone
